name.en-US: ERS-Interact-Comfort Elsys LoRaWAN Interact Comfort Panel
name.pt-BR: ERS-Interact-Comfort Painel Interact Comfort LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ERS-Interact-Comfort — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity and button presses. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ERS-Interact-Comfort — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade e acionamentos de botão. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
